visuals.title: Waste Management Strategies and Hierarchy
visuals.description: Animated diagram showing the five-tier waste hierarchy (Reduce, Reuse, Recycle, Recovery, Disposal), the recycling process flow, a sanitary landfill cross-section, treatment methods including Waste-to-Energy and biological treatment, and Integrated Waste Management policy tools.

diagrams.title: Key Components of a Sanitary Landfill

nodes.label:
Top Layer: Final Cap (Clay & Soil)
Prevents water ingress, allows vegetation

Waste Cells
Municipal Solid Waste is compacted and buried

Impermeable Liner System (Clay & HDPE Geomembrane)
Prevents leachate from escaping

Leachate Collection Pipes
Pumps leachate to treatment plant

Gas Extraction Wells
Collects methane gas for flaring or energy use
